summary: Implemented smooth visual transitions between 3D modes via opacity crossfade. Added uOpacity uniform to point and ribbon fragment shaders, setOpacity() methods to all three geometry systems (PointCloud, RibbonField, ParticleField), and replaced the instant mode swap in modeManager with a crossfade state machine. During transition (seeded 2-4s duration), both outgoing and incoming systems render simultaneously with complementary smoothstep-eased opacity. Audio continues uninterrupted as both systems receive the same FrameState. All 22 tests pass (8 new + 3 modified + 11 existing) and build succeeds.
